# EML-KAN Symbolic Composition & Differentiation for Diverse Modalities

This report presents the composition, extracted formulas, and analytical derivatives for diverse mathematical functions using multi-layer KAN `[1, 3, 1]` with $K=2$ trained under pure AdamW.

## 1. Summary Comparison Table

| Target Function | Target Derivative | Fit MSE Loss |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| $f_4(x) = \sin(e^x) - \cos(\log(\text{softplus}(x) + 10^{-6}))$ | `$e^{x} \cos{\left(e^{x} \right)} + \frac{e^{x} \sin{\left(\log{\left(\log{\left(e^{x} + 1 \right)} + 1.0 \cdot 10^{-6} \right)} \right)}}{\left(e^{x} + 1\right) \left(\log{\left(e^{x} + 1 \right)} + 1.0 \cdot 10^{-6}\right)}` | 0.00000044 |
| $f_5(x) = e^x \sin(x) - \log(\text{softplus}(\cos(x)) + 10^{-6})$ | `$e^{x} \sin{\left(x \right)} + e^{x} \cos{\left(x \right)} + \frac{e^{\cos{\left(x \right)}} \sin{\left(x \right)}}{\left(e^{\cos{\left(x \right)}} + 1\right) \left(\log{\left(e^{\cos{\left(x \right)}} + 1 \right)} + 1.0 \cdot 10^{-6}\right)}` | 0.00001080 |
| $f_6(x) = 1.5x^2 - 0.8x + e^{\sin(x)} - \log(\text{softplus}(x) + 10^{-6})$ | `$3.0 x + e^{\sin{\left(x \right)}} \cos{\left(x \right)} - 0.8 - \frac{e^{x}}{\left(e^{x} + 1\right) \left(\log{\left(e^{x} + 1 \right)} + 1.0 \cdot 10^{-6}\right)}` | 0.00000174 |
